title: Add 3.5e DD Magic Item Generator to Games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Rolling for Loot
gist.blurb: New in the showcase: a D&D 3.5e Magic Item Generator. Perfect for filling your players' bags of holding with procedurally generated treasures.
gist.summary: Added the '3.5e DD Magic Item Generator' to the community apps list.
gist.impact: Dungeon Masters can now discover this Python/PyQt6 tool for instantly generating Dungeons & Dragons loot tables.
gist.visual_concept: Dungeons & Dragons theme. Polly the bee as a Dungeon Master or looting a chest. Magic items glowing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, hovering over an open treasure chest that glows with lime green (#ecf874) magic. A pixelated sword and scroll float above it. Stone dungeon background with soft torchlight. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
